name: toolbar
title: Toolbar
description: JetBrains-style toolbar primitives built from Toolbar and ToolbarItem.

docs.description: JetBrains-style toolbar primitives with a minimal API: direction on Toolbar and direct separator orientation on ToolbarItem.
features: Only two primitives: Toolbar and ToolbarItem
Single direction entry point: horizontal, vertical, or floating
Direct separator orientation on each item using horizontal or vertical
Figma-aligned 26px item geometry and compact spacing
Accessible toolbar semantics and focus states
